OTC trading
for multiple Assets
Pre-Market
Trade token allocations before the official TGE.
Go to Pre-Market
Points
Trade points from projects that will be converted to allocations when TGE.
Go to Points-Market
OTC-Market
Trade any tokens without slippage - Peer to Peer.
Go to OTC-Market
Vesting Market
NEW
Trade tokens with vesting schedules, allowing you to unlock & access tokens over time.
Go to Vesting Market

SOON
NFT Whitelists Market
SOON

What Sets
Whales Market Apart

01
Trade Securely
02
Trade Multi Assets
03
Trade to Explore new frontiers

Trade Securely

Trade assets without the need to provide private keys. Simply deposit your holdings into our smart contract, and let Whales Market execute on your behalf.

Go to DApp

Trade multi assets

Trade various asset types on a single platform: pre-listing allocations, rewarding points, NFT whitelists, and vesting contracts—all across multiple blockchains.

Go To DApp

Trade to Explore new frontiers

Exploring the price of pre-listing assets before they touch liquidity. Whales Market is your one-stop hub for early investors, KOLs, and retail users to discover the best trading positions.

Go To DApp

Whale Shield:
Overall Protection For Your Trades

Whale stays with you against the embezzlement in the space. If a seller decides to ghost you, you can cancel your order immediately and claim the seller's collateral as compensation

Trustless And
Secured

Under Decentralized Playground

Go To DApp

Tokenomics

$WHALES is used to incentivize the growth of Whales Market transparently and fairly. There will be no presale for $WHALES as the initial liquidity is bootstrapped by the LootBot Treasury.

Airdrop (including the share to $LOOT stakers and $xLOOT holders)

5% - 5,000,000 - 50% TGE, linear vesting for 6 months

Incentives

65% - 65,000,000 - Linear emissions for 4 years

Team

9.5% - 9,500,000 - locked for 9 months & linear vesting for 36 months

Liquidity

7.5% - 7,500,000 - 100% TGE, liquidity locked/burned

Marketing

5% - 5,000,000 - 25% TGE, linear vesting for 24 months

Private Sale

7% - 7,000,000 - 50% TGE, linear vesting for 2 months

Security

1% - 1,000,000 - 100% TGE

Technical
Roadmap

From Q4/2023 - Q1/2024

MVP release.
Private Sale.
Mainnet Launch.
Pre-TGE market.
Token launch.
OTC market.
Revenue - Sharing Launch.
Full Audit.
Implement buyback and burn.
Implement the Emission Strategy.

From Q2/2024 - Q3/2024

DAO set-up.
Partnerships with Solana Ecosystem.
Introduce framework for DAO-controlled fees and emissions.
EVM Chains expansion.
Telegram Bot version release.
Introduce OTC market for vesting allocations.

Phase 3 (From Q2/2024)

Cosmos chains expansion.
Arbitrage Strategies for protocol.
R&D on further features that benefit protocol growth.
Partnerships with EVM/Cosmos Ecosystem.
